comfyui_server.description: The URL of the local running ComfyUI API server.

sdxl_checkpoint.description: Checkpoint filename for the base SDXL model inside ComfyUI's models/checkpoints folder.

sam_checkpoint.description: Name of the SAM 3.1 multiplex model used for roof segmentation.

controlnet_checkpoint.description: Checkpoint name for the ControlNet depth model inside ComfyUI's models/controlnet folder.

steps.description: Number of denoising/sampling steps for the KSampler.

cfg.description: Classifier-free guidance (CFG) scale for prompt adherence.

sampler_name.description: Sampler algorithm to use for generation (e.g. euler, dpmpp_2m).

denoise.description: Denoising strength. 1.0 means complete inpainting replacement.

threshold.description: Detection threshold for SAM segmentation mask.

refine_iterations.description: Number of refinement iterations for SAM detection.

individual_masks.description: Whether SAM should output individual detected masks (true) or merge them (false).

grow_mask_by.description: Pixels to expand/dilate the SAM mask to avoid seams/borders.

strength.description: The influence strength of the ControlNet depth map on the final output.

start_percent.description: Step percentage to start applying ControlNet (0.0 means from the start).

end_percent.description: Step percentage to stop applying ControlNet (1.0 means until the end).

a.description: MiDaS preprocessing factor 'a' for depth estimation.

bg_threshold.description: Background threshold for MiDaS depth calculation.

resolution.description: Resolution scale for MiDaS depth map preprocessor output.

bucket_name.description: The name of the Supabase Storage bucket where images are stored.

output_dir.description: Local workspace folder relative path to save generated output images.

default_house_image.description: Local workspace relative path to the default source house image.

local_mask_path.description: Local workspace relative path where the temporary/debug SAM mask is saved.

save_filename_prefix.description: Prefix used for output filenames generated by ComfyUI.

positive_prompt_template.value: photorealistic house roof inpainting, {prompt}, detailed shingle texture, high quality photography
positive_prompt_template.description: Template used to construct the positive prompt. '{prompt}' will be replaced with the specific tile/style selected by the user.

negative_prompt.value: text, watermark, ugly, deformed, blurry, forest, trees, nature, landscape, grass, leaves, branches, birch trees, vegetation, outdoors scene
negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt text to filter out undesired features from the generation.

default_tile_prompt.description: Default prompt to fall back to when no tile prompt is explicitly provided.

use_vertex_ai.description: Enable or disable Agent Platform (formerly Vertex AI) prediction endpoint usage.

location.description: GCP location/region where the endpoint is deployed.

endpoint_id.description: Agent Platform (formerly Vertex AI) custom prediction endpoint ID.
